final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand.

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact restraint level is yours
Composition: must be a hero section layout with left column (text content), center (model with product), right column (product display + stats), bottom benefit cards row
Subject: must include a young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
Scene/backdrop: must include soft purple flowers as floral accents, airy background
Lighting/mood: needs soft lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant with purple flower accents — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" (logo), "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。" (headline), "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。" (subheadline), navigation links: "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", CTA buttons: "今すぐ試す", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", feature badges: "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", bullet points: "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", stat cards: "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", benefit cards: "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must include all 5 navigation links, 3 feature badges (pill-shaped with small icons), 3 bullet points (pink checkmarks), 2 CTA buttons, 2 product items (dropper bottle + packaging box), 3 stat cards (floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents), 3 benefit cards (horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons)
Avoid:
